content.en:
"The Supreme of All Races is here!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu watched the many supremes of this cosmic era fly over, and also flew out of the temporary palace.

Rumble!

The two sides met in the starry sky, and wisps of supreme breath collided.

"First Divine Master, what's the matter? Could it be that we are going to end the Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son Project? But it shouldn't be time yet, and it seems that the real Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son has not yet been born!"

The main road of the Yuangu.

The First Divine Lord and other supremes naturally knew that the Divine Son of the Ten Thousand Realms had not yet been born, even if Ye Tian captured the ten sons of the era, as long as he did not kill the sons of the era or let the ten sons of the era admit defeat, there was no way to deprive them of their luck.

Therefore, Ye Tian has not yet become the Divine Son of the Ten Thousand Worlds, and the Ten Thousand Realms Divine Son plan is naturally not over.

Rumble!!!!

The First Divine Lord stepped out, looked directly at the Lord of the Yuan Gu and said: "Lord of the Yuan Gu, the Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son Project is indeed not over, but there has been a little change in the Ten Thousand Worlds, I have specially come to inform the Lord of the Yuan Gu for the sake of our friendship, so as not to have unnecessary conflicts between the two of us." "

"What's going on?"

The faces of the Supreme Lords of the Yuan Gu changed slightly, and they felt a little bad.

"Kunwu Supreme, you come and contact Ye Tian!"

The first god is the main way.

"Good!"

Kunwu Supreme walked out, took out the communication equipment, and contacted Ye Tian, who was in the Ten Thousand Realms Heavenly Realm.

Rumble!!!!

In the middle of the Heavenly Realm, the projection of the area where Ye Tian was located was projected into the void.

I saw Ye Tian standing in the middle of a mountain range, and the scene of the ten sons of the era being suppressed appeared in his hands.

Kunwu Supreme said: "Ye Tian of my clan has already captured the ten sons of the era, it stands to reason, Ye Tian can completely kill these ten sons of the era, and then he can obtain the luck of their bodies, become the god son of the ten worlds, and inherit the cosmic position of the messenger of the ten thousand domains! But these ten are the sons of the era after all, and the loss of one is enough to make a force feel heartache." Besides, this is still the son of ten epochs. If Ye Tian kills them, it is difficult to guarantee that the Supremes will not break the agreement and cause some unexpected situations to happen, so we have come to inform the Supremes!"

"What do you want to do!!!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu had a gloomy face.

At this time, the faces of the supremes behind the Lord of the Yuan Gu were also very ugly, especially the supremes behind the ten sons of the era were even more angry, if it weren't for the Lord of the Yuan Gu secretly warning them not to be impulsive, otherwise they would really rush over.

"It's nothing, it's just that the Supremes want to save the lives of these ten sons of the era. If it doesn't matter, then we'll let Ye Tian do it!"

"Wait a minute!" the Lord of the Yuan Gu hurriedly said: "Say, what conditions do you have, put it forward!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu knew very well that the real purpose of the First Divine Lord was not to kill the children of the ten eras, after all, it would not do them much good to do so.

There are more than 10 sons of the twelve cosmic epochs, and they have not grown up, even if they are killed, they will not be able to change the pattern, and will only intensify the contradictions between the two sides.

Besides, if the First Divine Lord wanted to kill the children of the ten eras, they would not have come to them.

Therefore, as long as the requirements of the First God Lord are met, the children of these ten epochs will be safe.

"How did you escape the Universe Apocalypse?

The First Divine Lord asked urgently.

As the first god lord of the Protoss, and almost the strongest supreme in the current universe era, he can hardly progress anymore, and once the great destruction of the universe comes, he will almost definitely die.

So, he wants to dodge the apocalypse!

If the great destruction of the universe can be avoided, wouldn't that be equivalent to eternal immortality, and you can live through the epochs of the universe?

In that case, even if you can't get out of it, it's nothing.

"Impossible!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu subconsciously said.

"Why, don't you want to say, if you don't want to, then the lives of these children of the ten epochs can't be decided by me!"

The First Divine Lord said with a smile.

"Lord of the Yuan Gu, don't worry, Ling Wu of my clan is still inside, he is the son of the top era, he must not fall inside!" a supreme said.

Under the persuasion of one supreme after another, the Lord of the Yuan Gu spoke: "In this way, let's discuss, how about it?"

"Yes, you can discuss slowly, we are not in a hurry!"

The first god is the main way.

Now it is the supreme beings such as the Lord of the Yuan Gu who are in a difficult situation, not them.

In the eyes of the First Divine Lord, the lives of the children of the ten epochs are absolutely important in the eyes of the Lord of the Ancient Ages, after all, the birth of the children of one epoch is not easy, and the number of forces in the twelve cosmic epochs is scarce, even if the race is recreated, it will take a long time to develop, and it is impossible not to care about the life and death of these sons of the era.

Besides, it's just to say how to avoid the Great Destruction of the Universe, and the Supremes of the Twelve Cosmic Epochs know it, and it is not impossible to tell them about the Supremes of the Thirteenth Cosmic Era.

Therefore, the First God Lord thought that it was very likely that the Lord of the Yuan Gu would speak.

At this time, the Lord of the Yuan Gu and other supremes were discussing.

"Everyone, what should we do now, how to avoid the great destruction of the universe is our extremely important secret, before that existence said that we have not informed the forces of this universe era, if we say it rashly, will we offend that existence?"

The main road of the Yuangu.

The Lord of the Immortal Heaven said: "It shouldn't be, the existence has informed us of the few supremes of the twelve cosmic eras, even if we tell the supreme of the thirteenth cosmic era, it is not a big deal." As long as you don't say the true purpose and the secret of His existence, it's fine. Only half of the secret is told, and there is no mention of the existence of the one. Moreover, if they were told, they would not be able to avoid the collapse of the universe, which was equivalent to useless news. It was worth it to exchange a useless piece of news for the lives of the children of the Ten Ages. Don't forget, every Child of Epoch is a seed of potential to break the limits and become transcendent. That being wants us to give birth to a few more transcendents, and we naturally cannot give up the lives of these children of the era. If they were to fight those races in the future, they would definitely know about it, and it didn't matter if they said it earlier. "

"I agree with the Lord of the Underworld, as long as you don't tell the core secret, just dodging the secret of the Great Destruction of the Universe is nothing, and they can't follow suit anyway!"

Another Golden Light Heavenly Venerable said.

After some discussion, many Supreme Beings agreed by a majority vote to inform the First Divine Lord and others about the secret of dodging the Great Destruction of the Universe.

Wow!

The Lord of the Yuan Gu stepped forward and came to the front of the First Divine Lord, and said, "First Divine Lord, we agree to tell you the secret of the Great Destruction of the Universe, but you must release the ten sons of the era!"

"Yes, I can guarantee it!"

The first god is the main way.
